author: vvo
subject: v3.0.0
body: # [3.0.0](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.2.5...v3.0.0) (2017-02-06) ### Bug Fixes * ***List:** disable shortcuts in *List SearchBoxes (algolia/react-instantsearch#1921) ([5bdc855](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/5bdc855)), closes [#1920](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/1920) * **Configure:** add configure parameters in search state (algolia/react-instantsearch#1935) ([f552d08](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/f552d08)), closes [#1863](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/1863) * **Hits:** limit the hitComponent to be only a function (algolia/react-instantsearch#1912) ([3ec2093](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/3ec2093)) * **Pagination:** fix and indicate when pagination is disabled ([4e2036c](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/4e2036c)), closes [algolia/react-instantsearch#1938](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/1938) * **StarRating:** usage with filters (algolia/react-instantsearch#1933) ([e4495eb](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/e4495eb)) * **withSearchBox:** keep displaying searchBox when no items found (algolia/react-instantsearch#1930) ([47a0107](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/47a0107)) ### Features * **MultiRange:** indicate if a range has no refinements (algolia/react-instantsearch#1926) ([ba873fe](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/ba873fe)) * **panel:** add a panel widget (algolia/react-instantsearch#1889) ([472579d](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/472579d)) * **starRating:** indicate when any refinement has no effect ([6926fc8](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/6926fc8)) * **widgets:** default design for disabled states (algolia/react-instantsearch#1929) ([52e434f](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/52e434f))
